MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Hearing Of Defendant Michael Spain'S Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Michael Spain's Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED. Dr. Bridget McKenna has executed an Affidavit of No records on April 28, 2014 and an Affidavit of Custodian of Records on May 1, 2014. Defendant's Request for sanctions is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Hearing Of Defendant Michael Spain'S Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Jul-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPAIN'S Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions - Transferred to Department 501 to be heard on July 18, 2014 at 9:30 am. (See SFLR 8.10). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

Hearing Of Defendant Michael Spain'S Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-06-2014 Continued To Jun-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael K. Budra, Esq. of The Biernat Law Group, Tel. 650.689.5160, for defendant and moving party;
Jacqueline Ravenscroft, Esq. of Tobener Law Center, Tel. 415.504.2165, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Defendant's counsel did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPAIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL BRIDGET MCKENNA, PH.D TO COMPLY WITH SUBPOENA FOR BUSINESS RECORDS AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is continued to June 17, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem shall prepare a Report and Recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPAIN's Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions is Transferred to Department 302 to be heard on June 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
